semantic.role: Vitest unit test suite for the KnowledgeGraphTask module, validating knowledge graph construction and persistence from dependency data.
responsibilities: Validates that KnowledgeGraphTask builds a knowledge graph from a list of file dependencies
Verifies that the constructed graph is persisted to disk via OutputManager with correct schema versioning
Tests file system setup and cleanup patterns for isolated test environments
Ensures graph nodes and edges correctly represent module dependency relationships
outOfScope: Does not define or export any production API surface
Does not implement knowledge graph logic itself
Does not handle production configuration or runtime execution
Does not perform integration or end-to-end tests against real LLM providers
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule: test-file-suffix)
Temporary directories are created and cleaned up per test lifecycle

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: This test file exists solely to validate the KnowledgeGraphTask's ability to construct and persist a dependency knowledge graph to disk. It follows isolated test patterns with temp directories and mocks.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: The git intent references removal of legacy CLI aliases, docs rebuild, and schema fixes—none of which directly alter this test file's contract or purpose.
